title: pyrus ratisbonensis
intro: Pyrus ratisbonensis, also known as the Ratisbon pear tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Pyrus ratisbonensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Pyrus ratisbonensis include infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other remedies.
